Tax Return Documents (Whittaker Jordan).pdf"}]}}

data: {"type":"text-start","id":"text-07a5da99-7de5-4e07-9313-267b0ab088d4"}

data: {"type":"text-delta","id":"text-07a5da99-7de5-4e07-9313-267b0ab088d4","delta":"The 2025 tax return for Jordan Whittaker shows the following key information:\n\n1. **Filing Status**: Single for all years compared (2023, 2024, 2025) [S2][S6].\n \n2. **Income**:\n - Total Income for 2025: $27,645, down from $50,000 in 2024 [S2][S6].\n - Adjusted Gross Income (AGI) for 2025: $27,645, also decreased from 2024's $50,000 [S2][S6].\n\n3. **Deductions**:\n - Total Deductions for 2025: $15,750, compared to $13,850 in 2024 [S2][S6].\n\n4. **Taxable Income**: For 2025, taxable income is $11,895, significantly lower than $36,150 in 2024 [S2][S6].\n\n5. **Taxes and Refund**:\n - Total tax for 2025 before credits: $1,188; a notable decrease from $4,113,850 in 2024 [S2][S6].\n - A refund amount of $533 is expected for 2025, down from $4,879 in 2024 [S2][S6].\n\n6. **State Information**: In Georgia (GA), the state income tax for 2025 reflects taxable income of $15,645, leading to a state tax of $812 and a refund of $188 [S1][S7].\n\nThis returns outlines a decrease in income and taxes from the previous year while still expecting a refund for 2025."}
